authors: Keren Tenenboim-Weinblatt Tali Aharoni Christian Baden a Department of Communication and Journalism
Israelb Reuters Institute for the Study of Journalism
title_zh: 作为不情愿的政治预言家的记者
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨记者在政治报道中扮演的角色，特别是他们如何像预言家一样预测政治事件，但可能对此感到不情愿。
plain_summary_en: This article examines the role of journalists in political reporting, focusing on how they act like prophets in predicting political events, but may be reluctant to do so.
research_direction_zh: 研究新闻业在政治传播中的角色和身份，特别是记者如何平衡报道事实与预测未来政治趋势。
research_direction_en: Investigates the role and identity of journalism in political communication, especially how journalists balance reporting facts with predicting future political trends.
